subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! The letter from My Name, the All-Glorious - upon him be My glory - hath attained unto Our presence and been heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی نامه اسمی جمال علیه بهائی بلحاظ فائز و همچنین باصغا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @power of the Manifestation of God
